title: Validate Multipart Uploads with Echo
summary: Validate one multipart upload in Echo with filename, content type, and file size checks.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers valid uploads, blank filenames, unsafe filenames, unsupported content types, spoofed content types, empty files, oversized files, exact-limit files, sanitized basenames, and the explicit content-type allowlist.
